# Lincoln Shower Door of Charlotte

> Family-owned, install-only frameless glass shower door contractor serving Charlotte, NC and surrounding areas including Gastonia, Belmont, Mount Holly, Lake Wylie, Kings Mountain, Shelby, Dallas, McAdenville, Lowell, Ranlo, and Bessemer City. Founded by a licensed glazier with over 20 years of glass fabrication and installation experience. Lincoln Shower Door installs custom frameless shower enclosures and related glass work, including glass office partitions, and does not manufacture or ship glass nationally.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://lincolnshowerdoor.com/): Company overview, service area, project gallery, and frequently asked questions.
- [How It Works](https://lincolnshowerdoor.com/process.html): Step-by-step explanation of the quote-to-installation process, including glass and hardware options.
- [Free Estimate](https://lincolnshowerdoor.com/estimate.html): Request a free estimate by submitting project details and photos.

## Services

- Frameless hinged shower doors
- Frameless sliding shower doors
- Neo-angle shower enclosures
- Frameless walk-in shower panels
- Semi-frameless shower doors
- Frameless steam shower enclosures
- Custom bathroom mirrors
- Glass wine rooms
- Glass office partitions (a core service line, though not reflected in the company name)
- Glass pool railings
- Back-painted glass backsplashes

## Service Area

Charlotte, Gastonia, Belmont, Mount Holly, Lake Wylie, Kings Mountain, Shelby, Dallas, McAdenville, Lowell, Ranlo, Bessemer City, and surrounding North Carolina communities.

## Contact

- Phone or text: 704-750-1245
- Email: joseph@lincolnshowerdoor.com

## Optional

- Lincoln Shower Door is an installation company, not a glass manufacturer. All work is custom-measured and installed on-site.
